body:
## Problem

Roster is now 67 drummers (`ls public/llms/drummers/*.md | wc -l` → 67), but several `/public/llms/*.md` hub files served to AI crawlers still advertise stale, smaller counts. This is the same generator-drift bug class that has recurred repeatedly (#4192, #4204, #4218, #4229, #4232, #4241, #4255) — #4205 (open) adds a CI check to catch this going forward, but the current drift still needs a one-time fix now.

Live-verified stale strings:

1. **`public/llms/gear-by-brand.md:6`** — *"Data covers 62 professional metal drummers..."*
   Generator `scripts/generate-llms-gear-by-brand.cjs:137` already uses `${drummers.length}` dynamically — this is just a **stale build artifact**. Fix: `node scripts/generate-llms-gear-by-brand.cjs` and commit the regenerated file. No code change needed.

2. **`public/llms/endorsements.md:11`** — *"Each of the 63 drummers has a dedicated endorsement page..."*
   Generator `scripts/generate-llms-endorsements.cjs:271` has the count **hardcoded** in a string literal: `'...full 63-drummer roster see [/llms/gear-by-brand.md]...'`. Fix: change to a template literal using the actual drummer array length (`` `...full ${drummers.length}-drummer roster see...` ``), then regenerate.

3. **`public/llms/kit-quiz.md:56`** — *"...based on data from 62 professional metal drummers currently in the MetalForge database."*
   **No generator script exists for this file** (confirmed: no `scripts/generate-llms-kit-quiz*.cjs`, and no other generator writes to `kit-quiz.md`) — it is hand-maintained and drifts every time the roster grows. Fix: directly edit the string in the committed file, `62` → `67`.

4. **`public/llms/index.md`** — four stale counts, **none of which are produced by `scripts/generate-llms-index.cjs`** (verified by reading the full 181-line script: it only dynamically fills the "Drummer Profiles (`${drummers.length}` total)" heading and table — none of the "LLM Resources" table rows below reference a count variable). These rows were hand-added in a prior issue directly to the committed markdown, not to the generator template:
   - Line 30: `Signature Licks | ... | ... overview for 65 drummers`
   - Line 36: `Gear Statistics | ... | Brand-popularity data for 65 drummers`
   - Line 41: `Kit Quiz | ... | ... match to one of 62 metal drummers`
   - Line 57: `Per-Drummer LLM Files | ... | ... for all 63 drummers ... (63 files)`
   - Line 60: `Per-Drummer Lick Files | ... | ... for all 63 drummers (63 files)`

   **⚠️ Do NOT fix by running `node scripts/generate-llms-index.cjs`** — since these rows aren't in the generator's template, a full regen would silently overwrite the file and delete them entirely (the script does a blind `fs.writeFileSync` of its own generated content). Fix: directly edit the 5 count occurrences in the committed `public/llms/index.md` from 65/62/63 → 67 (and `63 files` → `67 files` ×2).

## Why this matters

These are hub/index files specifically served to AI crawlers to advertise MetalForge's content scale (`/llms/index.md` is the top-level LLM discovery index referenced from `robots.txt`). Understating roster size (62/63/65 vs 67) undersells coverage to citing LLMs and is factually wrong content in files whose entire purpose is machine consumption.

## Verify

1. `grep -n "62 \|63 \|65 " public/llms/index.md public/llms/endorsements.md public/llms/gear-by-brand.md public/llms/kit-quiz.md` — no remaining stale counts referring to drummer roster size.
2. `node scripts/generate-llms-gear-by-brand.cjs && git diff --stat public/llms/gear-by-brand.md` shows only the count line(s) changed, nothing else regressed.
3. `node scripts/generate-llms-endorsements.cjs` after the code fix produces "67-drummer roster" in the regenerated file.
4. Confirm `public/llms/index.md`'s "LLM Resources" table rows (Signature Licks, Gear Statistics, Kit Quiz, Per-Drummer LLM/Lick Files) are all still present after the fix (i.e. they were hand-edited, not wiped by an accidental full regen).
5. `curl -s https://metalforge.io/llms/index.md | grep -c "67"` returns ≥5 (one per fixed row) post-deploy.

## Done

All drummer-count references in `public/llms/index.md`, `endorsements.md`, `gear-by-brand.md`, and `kit-quiz.md` read 67, matching the live roster, with no accidental loss of hand-maintained content in `index.md`.
title: SEO: Stale drummer-count strings in public/llms/ hub files (62/63/65 vs live 67-drummer roster)
